sections.content: The one key skill that distinguishes a successful leader from not so successful one is the ‘Emotional Intelligence’. The leader may be proficient and knowledgeable, but if the team dynamics are unbalanced, it can affect the growth of the organization. Mindful leadership means being empathetic, receptive, supportive and intentionally respectful of the team members. The 1 day ‘Mindful Leadership through Emotional Intelligence’ program helps being aware about emotions of self and also others while managing them at both the levels. It is an interactive intervention with self assessment and handling real life situations. It helps in elevating social relationship with all the stake holders, thus improving trust and productivity.

content: The one key skill that distinguishes a successful leader from not so successful one is the ‘Emotional Intelligence’. The leader may be proficient and knowledgeable, but if the team dynamics are unbalanced, it can affect the growth of the organization. Mindful leadership means being empathetic, receptive, supportive and intentionally respectful of the team members.

The 1 day ‘Mindful Leadership through Emotional Intelligence’ program helps being aware about emotions of self and also others while managing them at both the levels. It is an interactive intervention with self assessment and handling real life situations. It helps in elevating social relationship with all the stake holders, thus improving trust and productivity.
Understand what is Emotional Intelligence and how it is important
Learn to be aware of personal emotions and manage them
Validate the emotions in other people
Learn to identify different personality types and how to manage them
Appreciate different perspectives and learn how to influence people
Reduce conflict management and improve relationships with all stakeholders
